name: Shadowform
effect: Expend 1 Will to trigger Shadowform. Can only be cancelled at the Start of a Round. While Shadowform is active, increase your Base Special or Strength by 2 and increase Damage Dice for all moves by 2. Drain 1 Will after every turn. If Will hits 0 when Shadowform is active, User is inflicted with Confused that cannot be cured for Four Rounds and ignores the half-damage penalty when attacking their allies.
description: Absolute power corrupts absolutely, or so says those who are too cowardly to claim it for themselves.
